title: Bountiful Redux
body:
# ✦ More bountiful than ever ✨ **Bountiful Redux** is a modpack designed to improve your **Minecraft 1.8 experience** (The _Bountiful_ Update). It's perfect for anyone who doesn't like the current combat system introduced in 1.9 and wants some **new features, backports and QOL improvements** for their 1.8 playthrough. _*This is my first modpack so a follow is always appreciated :)_ # ✦ Features 📄 ### New features - Keystrokes - Free world hosting (allows you to invite friends to your worlds) - Improved villages - More LAN world customization options (incl. whitelist, banning etc.) - More new mob variants - Advanced particle customization - Village and villager names - Recording and replaying - Minimap and world map ### Backported features - Sounds from newer Minecraft versions - Glowing effect - 1.14 villages and villagers - Modern F3 features - Command autocompletion - Mob variants - Toki Pona translation - Cave sounds - Clouds - Bat textures - Many different block and item textures ### QOL improvements - The flat second layer of player skins is fully 3D modelled - Advanced old animations with 1.7 parity - Improved burning logic (incl. flaming arrows, fixed fire damage bugs etc.) - Village doors no longer keep chunks loaded (performance improvement) - Searching for keybinds in the keybinds menu - Crashes do not close Minecraft - FPS is reduced when the client window is minimized or not open - More shortcuts to move items in your inventory, trade windows and crafting - Item and recipe viewing from within the player inventory - Mobs retain their skin after becoming pets - Realms button removed as it often breaks on 1.8 and crashes the game - Zooming - QOL mods for Hypixel Skyblock - Text replacing ### Libraries - MixinBooter # ✦ Issues ❓ You can report all issues with the modpack in my Discord server. # ✦ Included mods and resource packs 📦 _All of the mods and resource packs in this pack come directly from the Modrinth website._
